title: ilex godajam var. sulcata
intro: Ilex godajam var. sulcata, commonly known as the Ilex sulcata, is a plant species within the holly family, characterized by its glossy leaves and small, yellowish flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits associated with Ilex sulcata include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In traditional herbal preparations, Ilex sulcata is often used in teas, infusions, and extracts to support overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
